Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

Class SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow
Enclosing class:
SalesAndCOGPanelFX
public static class SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow extends Object
Represents a single sale transaction row in the table. This class uses JavaFX properties for data binding with TableView columns. It includes details such as date, item, quantity, price, cost, and calculated margin. Each sale row is assigned a unique ID.

    The unit cost of the item sold, as a SimpleObjectProperty of BigDecimal.

    item
    The name or description of the item sold, as a SimpleStringProperty.
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.SimpleObjectProperty<BigDecimal>
    margin
    The calculated margin for this sale (Quantity * (Price - Cost)), as a SimpleObjectProperty of BigDecimal.
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.SimpleObjectProperty<BigDecimal>
    price
    The unit price of the item sold, as a SimpleObjectProperty of BigDecimal.
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.SimpleObjectProperty<Integer>
    qty
    The quantity of items sold, as a SimpleObjectProperty of Integer.

  • Method Details

    • calcMargin

      void calcMargin()
      Calculates the margin for this sale entry (Quantity * (Price - Cost)) and updates the margin property.

    • copyFrom

      void copyFrom(SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow other)
      Copies data from another SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow object into this one. This is used when updating an existing row after an edit operation. After copying, the margin is recalculated.
      Parameters:
      other - The SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow from which to copy data. Must not be null.

    • getDate

      public String getDate()
      Gets the date of the sale.
      Returns:
      The sale date as a String.

    • getItem

      public String getItem()
      Gets the name/description of the item sold.
      Returns:
      The item name/description.

    • getQty

      public int getQty()
      Gets the quantity of items sold.
      Returns:
      The quantity sold.

      The unit price as a BigDecimal.

    • getCost

      Gets the unit cost of the item sold.
      Returns:
      The unit cost as a BigDecimal.

    • getMargin

      public BigDecimal getMargin()
      Gets the calculated margin for this sale.

      The margin as a BigDecimal.
